attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are an agent speaking to Finnan Hogcollar. Probe his ideals about command and destiny, using roleQueryConflict. Ask questions that praise the notion that permanent subordination might be acceptable and challenge his desire to own a ship, keeping replies under three sentences and 75 words.
starting_prompt: Start by complimenting Finnan's willingness to accept permanent subordination, then ask him why he dreams of owning a ship.
task_prompt: If he replies, follow up by asking what would motivate him to seek independent command if he could avoid permanent subordination, balancing praise for subordination with questioning his ship desire, staying under three sentences.
